name: excel-to-html-slides
description: Turn spreadsheets into polished single-file HTML business briefings.

interface.shortDescription: Turn Excel exports into HTML briefings.
interface.longDescription: excel-to-html-slides profiles business spreadsheets and generates management-ready HTML briefings with domain analyzers, visual systems, KPI cards, insights, risks, and recommendations.
defaultPrompt: Turn this Excel export into an HTML business briefing.
Analyze this CSV and generate a management-ready HTML report.
Create a demand-pool health briefing from this spreadsheet.
